page.headline: Talk to your AI avatar
page.subhead: A natural voice conversation. Say "hello" to start, or use the button.

permission.title: We need your microphone
permission.description: So the bot can hear you, allow microphone access. We don't store audio — transcription happens in real time.
permission.deniedDescription: Enable microphone access in your browser settings and try again. You can also type your questions in the chat.

idle.wakeHint: You can also say "hello" to begin

listening.interruptHint: Say "question" anytime to be heard again

chat.title: Conversation
chat.empty: No messages yet. Speak or type to start.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: We couldn't get an answer. Try restarting the conversation.

inactivity.warning: Still there? The bot will reset in 30 seconds due to inactivity.
